nodes.name: Start: No-Website Phone Lead Report
nodes.description: Manually start the report of leads without a website but with a usable telephone number.

nodes.name: Fetch No-Website Leads With Phone
nodes.description: Read lead ID, company name, and telephone for leads that have no website.

parameters.query: SELECT id::text AS id, company_name, BTRIM(phone) AS phone FROM leads WHERE (website_url IS NULL OR BTRIM(website_url) = '' OR LOWER(BTRIM(website_url)) IN ('n/a', 'na', 'none', 'null', 'unknown', '-')) AND phone IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(phone) <> '' AND LOWER(BTRIM(phone)) NOT IN ('n/a', 'na', 'none', 'null', 'unknown', '-') ORDER BY company_name ASC, created_at ASC

nodes.name: Build Phone Lead Report
nodes.description: Create a safe Dee Empire HTML report containing lead ID, company name, and phone.

nodes.name: Send No-Website Phone Lead Report
nodes.description: Send the complete no-website phone lead report to Dee Empire.

nodes.name: Done: Phone Lead Report Sent
nodes.description: Return a stable summary after the internal report email is sent.

parameters.noteText:
NO-WEBSITE PHONE LEAD REPORT

Purpose:
Read all leads that have no website but do have a usable telephone number, then send an internal report to msesay@dee-empire.com.

Included fields:
- Lead ID
- Company name
- Telephone

Safety:
- Database query is read-only.
- No lead is called or contacted.
- The only email recipient is Dee Empire.
- Empty and placeholder website/phone values are normalized.

Requirements:
- The leads table must exist.
- The project Email Provider must be configured.

groups.name: Phase 1 - Query No-Website Phone Leads
groups.description: Read and format leads without a website that have a telephone number.

groups.name: Phase 2 - Send Internal Report
groups.description: Email the report only to Dee Empire and return a summary.
